description_long: This is a small, rustic wooden cabin elevated on four sturdy legs, with a steeply pitched gable roof covered in weathered shingles. The exterior walls are constructed from horizontally laid wooden planks, giving it a traditional, hand-built appearance. The front features a single, narrow door with a visibly worn texture, accessed by a short wooden ramp. There are no visible windows on any side, emphasizing a simple and utilitarian design. A small basket or box is attached beneath the rear of the cabin, possibly for storage or collection purposes. The overall structure suggests durability and functionality, suitable for use in parks, gardens, or as a small outbuilding in an urban setting.
description: A small, elevated rustic wooden cabin with a steep gable roof, single front door, and no visible windows. The weathered wood and simple design evoke a traditional, utilitarian style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the narrow door, wooden ramp, and the gable roof's peak.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the full length of the shingled roof, solid plank wall, and a basket or box beneath the cabin.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a plain wooden wall with no openings and the cabin's elevated legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the solid plank wall and the protruding ramp structure.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with wooden shingles and moderate overhangs
attribute_window_arrangement: No visible windows on any side; solid plank walls throughout
attribute_door_placement: Single narrow door centered on the front facade, accessed by a ramp
